title: Spectate Spec
description: Closed-world declaration of effects a codebase is permitted to perform.

version.description: Schema version. v1 is the only supported version.

unresolved_handling.description: How to render Observations whose parameter could not be statically resolved.

stdlib_auto_allow.description: When true, stdlib imports are auto-allowed and suppressed from the Bulletin.

required.description: Effects that MUST appear. Either bare strings (repo-wide) or {handler, value} objects (scoped).

allowed.description: Effects that MAY appear. Suppressed from the Bulletin when present.

forbidden.description: Effects that MUST NOT appear. Reported as high-severity Findings when present.

oneOf.description: Unconditional requirement: this effect must appear somewhere in the repo.

handler.description: Handler address. Format: 'path/to/file.py::function_name'. A trailing '::*' matches all handlers in the file. A bare 'function_name' matches that function in any file.

value.description: Effect parameter (host, path glob, binary, package, env var, table).
